reason: Review gate: build/tests pass, forbidden patterns (any, untyped invoke, swallowed errors, mutated state), checklist
Verify invoke<BuildOrder[]> typed, TS type matches Rust serde shape, on-disk data validated at boundary, no any/unchecked casts
Verify load_build_orders contract synced (name/args/return/registration), returns Result<T,E>, frontend wraps in try/catch
Verify any added plugin has a matching minimal capability; std::fs path needs none
Run the after-command checklist; catch serde/TS BuildOrder field drift across the boundary
